nodes.name: App.tsx
nodes.summary: Defines the top-level React route tree, wrapping authenticated areas with auth and watchlist providers and routing public, protected, and admin pages.
nodes.languageNotes: React Router nested routes separate the login page from protected application shell routes.

nodes.name: AdminRoute.tsx
nodes.summary: Guards admin-only routes by checking authentication state and admin privileges before rendering child content.

nodes.name: ProtectedRoute.tsx
nodes.summary: Protects authenticated routes by showing a loading state while auth resolves and redirecting anonymous users to login.

nodes.name: InvestmentPrioritySurveyModal.tsx
nodes.summary: Presents a multi-step investment priority survey and converts answers into an AHP comparison matrix for downstream scoring.
nodes.languageNotes: The component keeps transient wizard state locally and delegates AHP score conversion to utility functions.

nodes.name: AhpWeightsBarChart.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders AHP criterion weights as a vertical Recharts bar chart using labels from the AHP utility module.

nodes.name: FinancialBarChart.tsx
nodes.summary: Transforms annual stock financial records into a grouped bar chart for revenue, net income, operating cash flow, and free cash flow.

nodes.name: PortfolioPieChart.tsx
nodes.summary: Displays portfolio allocation percentages as a donut-style pie chart keyed by stock symbol.

nodes.name: RatioCompareChart.tsx
nodes.summary: Compares stock valuation ratios against industry benchmarks in a grouped Recharts bar chart.

nodes.name: ValuationLineChart.tsx
nodes.summary: Plots DDM, DCF, residual income, and end-year price series over time for stock valuation review.

nodes.name: VietstockIframe.tsx
nodes.summary: Embeds an external Vietstock technical chart iframe with a local loading overlay keyed by stock symbol.

nodes.name: AppShell.tsx
nodes.summary: Provides the authenticated application layout with sidebar navigation, top bar titles, page outlet, and MQTT connection startup.

nodes.name: Sidebar.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders primary navigation, admin-only links, live MQTT status, and sign-out control for the app shell.

nodes.name: TopBar.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders the page title and authenticated user menu with profile navigation and logout behavior.

nodes.name: Badge.tsx
nodes.summary: Provides a small variant-driven badge component for status and category labels.

nodes.name: ErrorBanner.tsx
nodes.summary: Displays dismissible error messaging with consistent red alert styling and iconography.

nodes.name: LoadingSpinner.tsx
nodes.summary: Provides reusable inline and full-screen loading indicators with configurable size and optional label.

nodes.name: Modal.tsx
nodes.summary: Implements a reusable modal overlay with size variants, optional title, backdrop close, and Escape-key handling.

nodes.name: PriceTag.tsx
nodes.summary: Formats and displays stock prices with optional flashing highlight styling for live price changes.

nodes.name: ScoreBar.tsx
nodes.summary: Visualizes a normalized score as a colored progress bar with optional numeric label.

nodes.name: StatCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders dashboard metric cards with accent color variants, optional supporting text, and optional icon slot.

nodes.name: TabGroup.tsx
nodes.summary: Provides a compact segmented tab control with active-state styling and optional tab icons.

nodes.name: api.ts
nodes.summary: Normalizes the frontend API base URL from Vite environment configuration and exports profile and stock endpoint URLs.

nodes.name: AuthContext.tsx
nodes.summary: Centralizes frontend authentication state, localStorage persistence, user-detail refresh, login, logout, and auth context access.
nodes.languageNotes: React context and callback hooks keep auth state accessible while avoiding repeated user detail fetch logic.

nodes.name: WatchlistContext.tsx
nodes.summary: Maintains the authenticated user watchlist as a React context and refreshes favorite stock IDs from the user API.

nodes.name: useAhpWeights.ts
nodes.summary: Loads saved AHP weights for a user, normalizes persisted JSON values, and falls back to default TOPSIS weights.

nodes.name: useAuth.ts
nodes.summary: Re-exports the auth context hook under the shorter useAuth name for components and pages.

nodes.name: App
nodes.summary: Builds the application provider hierarchy and route declarations for public, protected, and admin screens.

nodes.name: AdminRoute
nodes.summary: Renders child content only for authenticated admin users, otherwise showing loading or redirect states.

nodes.name: ProtectedRoute
nodes.summary: Renders child content for authenticated users and redirects anonymous users to the login route.

nodes.name: InvestmentPrioritySurveyModal
nodes.summary: Runs the AHP survey wizard, records answers, handles navigation, and submits a generated pairwise matrix.

nodes.name: AhpWeightsBarChart
nodes.summary: Maps AHP weights into percentage chart data and renders them as a labeled vertical bar chart.

nodes.name: FinancialBarChart
nodes.summary: Converts yearly financial metrics into sorted chart data and renders grouped bars with formatted tooltips.

nodes.name: PortfolioPieChart
nodes.summary: Transforms portfolio allocation records into percentage slices for a responsive pie chart.

nodes.name: RatioCompareChart
nodes.summary: Builds stock-versus-industry ratio rows and renders them as a comparison bar chart.

nodes.name: ValuationLineChart
nodes.summary: Sorts annual valuation records and renders multiple valuation and price lines over time.

nodes.name: VietstockIframe
nodes.summary: Constructs a Vietstock chart URL for a symbol and manages iframe loading visibility.

nodes.name: AppShell
nodes.summary: Computes page titles from the route path, starts MQTT connectivity, and composes sidebar, top bar, and outlet layout.

nodes.name: NavItem
nodes.summary: Wraps React Router NavLink styling for a single sidebar navigation item with active-state presentation.

nodes.name: Sidebar
nodes.summary: Builds the app navigation rail, tracks MQTT connection status, conditionally shows admin navigation, and triggers logout.

nodes.name: TopBar
nodes.summary: Displays the current page title and user account dropdown, including profile navigation and logout redirection.

nodes.name: ErrorBanner
nodes.summary: Renders an error alert with optional dismiss control and consistent icon styling.

nodes.name: LoadingSpinner
nodes.summary: Builds a configurable spinner and switches between full-screen overlay and inline centered presentation.

nodes.name: Modal
nodes.summary: Controls modal rendering, Escape-key close behavior, backdrop dismissal, size variants, and optional title chrome.

nodes.name: PriceTag
nodes.summary: Applies size and flashing variants around a formatted stock price display.

nodes.name: ScoreBar
nodes.summary: Clamps a score to percentage width and assigns color bands for low, medium, and high scores.

nodes.name: StatCard
nodes.summary: Displays a labeled metric with accent-specific ring and icon styling for dashboard panels.

nodes.name: TabGroup
nodes.summary: Renders a set of selectable tabs and forwards tab id changes through a callback.

nodes.name: persistUserDetail
nodes.summary: Persists or clears cached user details in localStorage while ignoring storage and serialization failures.

nodes.name: AuthProvider
nodes.summary: Owns auth state initialization, user-detail loading, login persistence, logout cleanup, and context value publication.

nodes.name: useAuthContext
nodes.summary: Reads the auth context and throws when used outside the AuthProvider boundary.

nodes.name: WatchlistProvider
nodes.summary: Loads favorite stock IDs for the current user and publishes watchlist state and refresh behavior through context.

nodes.name: useWatchlist
nodes.summary: Reads the watchlist context and enforces use inside WatchlistProvider.

nodes.name: useAhpWeights
nodes.summary: Fetches persisted AHP weight configuration for a user and falls back to default weights on missing or invalid data.
